name: query-index-modify
description: Add execution module exports: export type { ISqlExecutor, SqlExecutorConfig } from './execution/types', export { BunSqlExecutor } from './execution/bun-sql', export { snakeToCamel, camelToSnake, normalizeRows } from './execution/utils'. Also add PostgresBackend export.
rationale: Public API surface for new execution and postgres backend modules.
